title: Senior Software Engineer - Rackspace India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Rackspace India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Rackspace India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rackspace India:
Rackspace India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rackspace India!
